biography:
Solly McLeod (born 10 February 2000) is a British actor. On television, he starred in the ITVX miniseries Tom Jones (2023). His films include Jericho Ridge, The Dead Don't Hurt (both 2023), and Last Swim (2024).

name: Solly McLeod
